application.name: 关键字二维码菜单分组
application.ability: 关键字二维码菜单分组
application.description: 关键字二维码菜单分组
application.author: 微赞

manifest.install: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_cgc_addr_group` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `weid` int(10) NOT NULL, `addr` varchar(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户的地址', `group_id` int(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '分组id', `group_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '分组名称', `url` varchar(300) NOT NULL COMMENT '跳转链接', `remark` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '备注', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_cgc_fans_info` ( `id` int(10) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `weid` int(10) NOT NULL, `rid` int(3) NOT NULL, `subscribe` int(2) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户是否订阅该公众号标识，值为0时，代表此用户没有关注该公众号，拉取不到其余信息，只有openid和UnionID（在该公众号绑定到了微信开放平台账号时才有）。', `openid` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户的标识', `nickname` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '用户昵称', `sex` varchar(2) NOT NULL COMMENT '性别', `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '城市', `country` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '国家', `province` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '省份', `language` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `headimgurl` varchar(1000) NOT NULL, `subscribe_time` int(10) NOT NULL, `unionid` int(10) NOT NULL, `remark` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `groupid` int(10) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_cgc_group_info` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `rid` int(3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `keyword` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联关键字', `weid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `count` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `group_id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `name` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `group_desc` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `show` int(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '是否显示 0 显示，1不显示', `createtime` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生成时间', `rule_keyword` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_cgc_group_record` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `weid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `type` int(1) NOT NULL COMMENT '0关键字1二维码，2默认关注', `nickname` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `openid` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `group_id` int(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `group_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `createtime` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '创建时间', `content` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_cgc_qrcode_info` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `weid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `qrcid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '二维码场景ID', `name` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '场景名称', `keyword` varchar(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '关联关键字', `model` tinyint(1) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '模式，1临时，2为永久', `ticket` varchar(250) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '标识', `show_url` varchar(550) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT '图片地址', `expire` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '过期时间', `subnum` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '关注扫描次数', `createtime` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '生成时间', `status` tinyint(1) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0为未启用，1为启用', `group_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '分组名称', `group_id` int(3) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ims_temp_fans` ( `id` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `uniacid` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `nickname` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `openid` varchar(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `note` varchar(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8;
